entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Run boundary stabilization cleanup loop
entries.summary: Performs the first required validation, neighboring-surface expansion, fixes, docs updates, and commit pass after the main implementation slices land.

entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Run extensibility and portability hardening loop
entries.summary: Performs the second required validation loop focused on pack portability, extensibility, and surrounding contract cleanup.

entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Publish host-pack standards, references, templates, and workflow modules
entries.summary: Documents the final core-host-pack contract and updates workflow routing, command docs, and pack authoring guidance.

entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Introduce watchtower_host and move CLI composition out of reusable core
entries.summary: Moves parser construction and command registration into a host-owned package while preserving the watchtower-core binary name.

entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Add governed pack registry and runtime manifest contracts
entries.summary: Defines the core-owned registry, schemas, typed models, and validator hooks for host-pack integration.

entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Add pack-interface validation, import-boundary guards, and second-pack proofs
entries.summary: Proves the new architecture with validator coverage, boundary guards, and a synthetic second-pack fixture.

entries.initiative_title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.title: Refactor watchtower_plan into pack-native feature services and namespaced commands
entries.summary: Rebuilds the plan package around pack-native feature seams instead of mirrored core-style families.

entries.title: Bootstrap Core Shared Language Deplanification
entries.summary: Bootstrap Core Shared Language Deplanification live initiative package.

entries.title: Normalize Shared Core Language
entries.summary: Deplanifies shared standards, reusable-core READMEs, and registries while keeping current pack paths as concrete repo facts.

entries.title: Validate And Close Out Deplanification
entries.summary: Refreshes derived surfaces, validates the changed docs and registries, and closes the initiative cleanly.

entries.initiative_title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.title: Add second-pack fixture and multi-pack proofs
entries.summary: Strengthens the generic hosted-pack contract with a second-pack fixture informed by WatchTowerOversight shape.

entries.initiative_title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.title: Bootstrap Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.summary: Bootstrap Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof live initiative package.

entries.initiative_title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.title: Define portable pack capsule and validation contract
entries.summary: Tightens the portability rules for manifests, owned roots, packaging assumptions, and validator behavior.

entries.initiative_title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.title: Exercise plan copy-out and packaging proof
entries.summary: Proves that the plan pack can be treated as an externalized package with only packaging and path adjustments.

entries.initiative_title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.title: Publish externalized pack authoring guidance
entries.summary: Updates standards, references, and workflow guidance for externalized and future hosted packs.

entries.title: Bootstrap First-Party Root Pack Roots
entries.summary: Bootstrap First-Party Root Pack Roots live initiative package.

entries.initiative_title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.title: Align WatchTowerOversight to host-layer parity
entries.summary: Moves WatchTowerOversight CLI composition behind a host layer and aligns its core-host-pack runtime boundaries with WatchTowerPlan.

entries.initiative_title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.title: Bootstrap Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.summary: Bootstrap Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening live initiative package.

entries.initiative_title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.title: Flatten plan runtime into feature-owned modules
entries.summary: Reorganizes watchtower_plan so remaining adapter-style package families collapse into feature-owned plan services and minimal host-facing adapters.

entries.initiative_title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.title: Turn pack starter templates into a scaffold command surface
entries.summary: Adds an operator-facing scaffold path that renders the hosted-pack starter templates into a validated pack skeleton.

entries.initiative_title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.title: Validate and close out the hosted-pack tranche
entries.summary: Runs the explicit cross-repo validation bundle for host parity, scaffold output, and plan runtime flattening, then closes the initiative.

entries.title: Bootstrap Ledger Retirement Contract Change
entries.summary: Bootstrap Ledger Retirement Contract Change live initiative package.

entries.title: Bootstrap Pack Bootstrap Installation Contract
entries.summary: Bootstrap Pack Bootstrap Installation Contract live initiative package.

entries.title: Bootstrap Pack CLI Fault Isolation Hardening
entries.summary: Bootstrap Pack CLI Fault Isolation Hardening live initiative package.

entries.title: Harden Pack CLI Fault Isolation
entries.summary: Return structured integration-import failures and keep the host CLI usable when unrelated registered packs are broken.

entries.title: Bootstrap Pack Domain Hardcoding Remediation
entries.summary: Bootstrap Pack Domain Hardcoding Remediation live initiative package.

entries.title: Pack-drive runtime roots and validation selection
entries.summary: Remove remaining fixed pack-root assumptions from runtime helpers, CLI defaults, and validation selection.

entries.title: Re-root governed contracts and generated surfaces
entries.summary: Move remaining plan-specific governed contracts out of shared-core assumptions and bind them through pack-owned declarations.

entries.title: Recover rich human docs and guidance from pack-driven state
entries.summary: Review main-branch patterns and restore rich human-facing documentation and navigation without reintroducing hardcoded domain roots.

entries.title: Run assessment pass one
entries.summary: Run the first full repository assessment after the main hardcoding fixes land and convert any new gaps into tracked remediation work.

entries.title: Run assessment pass two
entries.summary: Repeat the full repository assessment after the boundary cutover, remove the last residue findings, and confirm there are no remaining actionable pack-domain hardcoding gaps.

entries.title: Split core and plan Python boundary
entries.summary: Move repo-local planning runtime under plan/python/src/watchtower_plan/, keep reusable core fail-closed, and guard against .wt or repo_ops regression.

entries.title: Verify report findings and map pack roots
entries.summary: Validate the hardcoding assessment against the current repository and map the actual pack-root authority seams.

entries.initiative_title: Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
entries.title: Align WatchTowerOversight to the shared pack contract
entries.summary: Aligns the oversight pack to the shared core-host-pack contract in its own repository.

entries.initiative_title: Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
entries.title: Bootstrap Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
entries.summary: Bootstrap Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment live initiative package.

entries.initiative_title: Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
entries.title: Publish hosted-pack starter templates
entries.summary: Adds governed starter templates and guidance for new hosted packs.

entries.initiative_title: Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
entries.title: Validate starter templates and oversight adoption
entries.summary: Proves the starter templates and real oversight alignment through validation and closeout evidence.

entries.title: Bootstrap Plan Python Package Dependency Cleanup
entries.summary: Bootstrap, author, confirm, and approve the installable-package cleanup initiative.

entries.title: Make plan/python installable
entries.summary: Add package metadata for plan/python and install watchtower_plan through the shared core/python workspace without a second environment.

entries.title: Remove repo-local bootstrap from watchtower_core
entries.summary: Delete repo-local path bootstrapping from watchtower_core and rely on the installed watchtower_plan package boundary instead.

entries.title: Validate workspace package split and close out
entries.summary: Validate the installable-package cutover, repeat the boundary residue pass, and close the initiative on the final green tree.

entries.title: Bootstrap Requirements And Decisions Adherence Remediation
entries.summary: Bootstrap Requirements And Decisions Adherence Remediation live initiative package.

entries.title: Enforce the six-section plan overview contract
entries.summary: Make the six-section plan overview template authoritative across template catalog, registry, renderer, tests, and live output.

entries.title: Hard-cut planning terminology and phase vocabulary
entries.summary: Replace retired planning-model language and stale initiative phase names on active surfaces with the initiative-package model.

entries.title: Harden residue and domain_packs regression guards
entries.summary: Add explicit tests and validation gates that block reintroduction of root docs, domain_packs, and retired planning-model residue.

entries.title: Re-root command, reference, template, and core standard docs
entries.summary: Move shared command pages, references, templates, and core-owned standards from root docs into core/docs and update their governed roots.

entries.title: Move plan-domain governance and standards into plan/docs
entries.summary: Move plan-domain governance and plan-runtime standards under plan/docs and remove the root docs authority.

entries.title: Replace retired planning-document semantics
entries.summary: Remove the remaining pre-cutover planning-document semantic helpers and validate only the live initiative-package authored inputs.

entries.title: Restore rich human-facing rendering and navigation
entries.summary: Recover the stronger markdown structure, browseable tables, and summary-plus-detail navigation while keeping machine indexes compact.

entries.title: Run full assessment pass one
entries.summary: Run the first full repository assessment after the main cutover slices land and convert any new gaps into tracked remediation work.

entries.title: Run full assessment pass two
entries.summary: Run the final repository assessment after cleanup and guards are in place and close any remaining gaps before initiative closeout.

entries.title: Bootstrap Remaining Dirty Tranche Closeout
entries.summary: Bootstrap Remaining Dirty Tranche Closeout live initiative package.

entries.title: Land docs and governance reconciliation tranche
entries.summary: Commits the foundations, governance, initiative-package, and derived-surface reconciliation changes.

entries.title: Land retained-records and machine-contract slice
entries.summary: Commits the retained-records cutover, control-plane contract updates, and related runtime changes.

entries.initiative_title: Test Suite Efficiency And Redundancy Reduction

entries.summary: Bootstrap Test Suite Efficiency And Redundancy Reduction live initiative package.

entries.initiative_title: Test Suite Efficiency And Redundancy Reduction
entries.title: Optimize sync CLI hotspot tests
entries.summary: Replace redundant expensive sync CLI smoke tests with lightweight forwarding coverage while preserving representative end-to-end sync assertions.

entries.initiative_title: Test Suite Efficiency And Redundancy Reduction
entries.title: Optimize task lifecycle and sync hotspots
entries.summary: Reduce repeated coordination rebuild cost in lifecycle and sync integration tests while preserving at least one true rebuild path.

entries.initiative_title: Test Suite Efficiency And Redundancy Reduction
entries.title: Reprofile optimized suite and close initiative
entries.summary: Rerun hotspot timings and the broad validation gate, then close the initiative once the suite is materially faster and still green.
